title: Marketplace Manager - Just Herbs South Asia Partners - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Just Herbs South Asia Partners - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Just Herbs South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Just Herbs South Asia Partners:
Just Herbs South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs South Asia Partners!
